title: Property Consultant - PropTiger - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropTiger - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
PropTiger has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!
